zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Heaton於1318年出生在英國諾圖波藍德林加姆時，她的父親Thomas de Heaton59歲，母親Joan NEVILLE61歲。她於1331年與Hugh de Cotton在英國史洛普爾阿爾維勒結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1344年在英國爾盧德亞斯享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Heaton于1318年出生在英国諾圖波藍德林加姆时，她的父亲Thomas de Heaton59岁，母亲Joan NEVILLE61岁。她于1331年与Hugh de Cotton在英国史洛普爾阿爾維勒结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1344年在英国爾盧德亞斯享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: Heaton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English hēah ‘high’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’: Heaton (Yorkshire, Northumberland); Heaton Norris, Heaton under Horwich, Heaton with Oxcliffe, Great Heaton, Little Heaton (all Lancashire); Capheaton, Kirkheaton (Northumberland); Cleckheaton, Hanging Heaton, Kirkheaton (Yorkshire). This surname was taken to Ireland in the mid 17th century, and within Ireland is now mainly found in Ulster.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Heaton was born in 1318, in Chillingham, Northumberland, England, her father, Thomas de Heaton, was 59 and her mother, Joan NEVILLE, was 61. She married Hugh de Cotton in 1331, in Alveley, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1344, in Rudheath, Cheshire, England, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Heaton est née en 1318, à Chillingham, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Heaton, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Joan NEVILLE, avait 61 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Cotton en 1331, à Alveley, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1344, à Rudheath, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Heaton 1318 in Chillingham, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Heaton 59 und ihre Mutter Joan NEVILLE 61. Sie hat 1331 in Alveley, Shropshire, England Hugh de Cotton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1344 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Rudheath, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Heaton è nata il nel 1318 nel Chillingham, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Thomas de Heaton, aveva 59 anni e sua madre, Joan NEVILLE, aveva 61 anni. Lei sposato Hugh de Cotton nel 1331, nel Alveley, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1344, nel Rudheath, Cheshire, England, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Heatonが1318年にイギリスノースウンバーランドチリンガムで生まれた時，父Thomas de Heatonは59歳，母Joan NEVILLEは61歳であった。1331年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアアルベリーでHugh de Cottonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1344年にイギリスチェシュアイアルドヒースで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Heaton(이)가 1318년 영국 노르스벌랜드 치링함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Heaton(은)는 59세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan NEVILLE(은)는 61세였다. 그녀는 1331년 영국 슈럽실르 앨벨리에서 Hugh de Cotton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1344년 영국 체실르 루드히스에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Heaton nasceu em 1318, em Chillingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Heaton, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Joan NEVILLE, tinha 61 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Cotton em 1331, em Alveley, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1344, em Rudheath, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Heaton родилась в 1318 г. в местности чиллингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Heaton было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan NEVILLE, 61. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Cotton в 1331 г. в местности алвели, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1344 г. в местности рудхит, чешир, Англия в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Heaton nació en 1318, en Chillingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Heaton, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Joan NEVILLE, tenía 61 años. Se casó con Hugh de Cotton en 1331, en Alveley, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1344, en Rudheath, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 26 años.
